# ClickUp

> AI Registry entry [AIR-44](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-44/clickup) — status **Rejected** as of 2026-04-22. Departments: office-of-ceo.

**Category:** Project Management / Work Management Platform
**Status:** REJECTED (2026-04-21)
**Cost:** Free tier; Team, Business, Enterprise (TBC demo required)
**Departments:** Office of CEO (requested), potentially multi-department
**Requested by:** Bonaventure Wong (Group CEO)

## Overview

All-in-one AI-powered work management platform consolidating PM, task tracking, doc collaboration, chat, dashboards, time tracking. Positions as replacement for Asana, Trello, Monday, Jira, Notion, Slack. 3M+ teams.

## Core Capabilities

* 15+ project views (List, Board, Calendar, Timeline, Workload, Table)
* Custom fields, statuses, automations (100+ templates)
* Built-in Docs & Wikis
* Whiteboards convertible to tasks
* Forms, Gantt with dependencies, Templates
* **ClickUp Brain** — AI-generated plans, assignments, status updates
* AI Notetaker (ClickUp/Zoom/Teams)
* Enterprise Search across apps
* AI agents (sprint planning, resource allocation, standup facilitation)
* Super Agents and Ambient Agents

## Integrations

1,000+ integrations: Slack, Calendar, Sheets, GitHub, GitLab, Zoom, Teams, Figma, Jira, Asana, Salesforce, HubSpot, Tableau, Zendesk, Intercom, N8N, Make, Confluence, Miro.

## Security

* SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR, HIPAA compliant
* SSO enterprise support

## Why Rejected

Monday.com (AIR-83) selected as the work management platform after CRM matrix evaluation. Carrying ClickUp + Monday forward as parallel evaluations was deemed wasted cycles. ClickUp rejected to consolidate on Monday.

*Rejected.*
